title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.9.1 - Balance: self-debuff cards are retuned so a self-Jaded card is worth at least one extra energy of stats. Most self-debuff attacks and blocks hit harder (e.g. Running on Fumes 7/8 -> 12/8, The Shakes 7/12 -> 12/12, Writer's Block 12 -> 18 block, Break a Leg 15 -> 17). Crying Out Loud now grants Vigor when a buff OR debuff of yours clears. Requires BaseLib.
